game.short_text: Build your own dungeon as you explore it and fight the evil creatures that roam inside.
game.title: This is your dungeon

details.title: This is your dungeon
details.description:
This Jam game has been extended into a Full Game !!!
Check out : Tilemancer Dungeon

-------------------------------------
Made in 48h for KenneyJam 2023with the theme Exploration
-------------------------------------A damned cyclops & his minions decided to make their nest in your dungeon.Your Dungeon ! For F sack !But there's one thing they didn't anticipate...The dungeon obey only to you. You can mold it as you see fit.Place rooms as you go to create the ideal path to victory and reclaim your dungeon.

------Controls------ 
Left click  - select, use & place a roomLeft click - move to a roomRight click - unselect a roomP or Escape - to pause
------Notes------
The game should be able to detect if you trapped yourself by closing every available paths and throw you a game over. But in case you get stuck anyway you can restart a run from the pause menu.


------Sources------ 

------Music------ 
8bit Dungeon Boss by Kevin Macleod
8bit Dungeon Level by Kevin Macleod
------ Sounds------ 
Pack: 8-bit by timgormly
8 Bit Slam by Jofae
Pack: Hurt (Retro video game SFX) by cabled_mess
Pack: 8-Bit Sound Effects Library by LittleRobotSoundFactory
Poof/Puff by JustInvoke
Heal - Rpg by colorsCrimsonTears
8-bit footsteps.wav by EVRetro
UI Audio Pack by Kenney
------ Sprites------ 
Tiny Dungeon by Kenney
Scribble Dungeons By Kenney
UI Pack (RPG Expansion) By Kenney
Splat Pack By keney
------ Fonts------ 
Kenney Pixel By kenney
Southland by MJB Letters

game.short_text: A small movement-based metroidvania made for Kenney Jam 2023
game.title: CALLIE

details.title: CALLIE
details.description:
You are CALLIE. Living in your forest home hasnurtured your curiosity and you finally decide to go explore the world. What lies hidden aroundthe corner? Play and find out!

Game by GoFrog Games
Lead developer:　@melonboyMusic and sounds:　@Chai the TeaPlay testing and scenery artist:　@Torsk

Controls
'WASD' or Arrow Keys:　Move (up and down on vines or ladders)
'Space':　Jump (hold for more height)
'Page Up' / 'Page Down':　Change color palette
'E':　Enter level
'Shift' / 'F':　Use power (when unlocked)
(Last power-up is a wall-run, jump onto walls to use)
Thoughts
Was fun to make and I surprised myself with how much I could get done. Definitelyroom for improvement. Also know that there is no real ending. After the third powerup, there's a last section before you can enter a hole which is where I ran out of time.
Hope you enjoy! Upgraded version to be released after judging period.

Known Issues
No ending.Only one checkpoint in the third level.Camera at right side of forest moves the wrong way.

game.short_text: A platformer where you jump on your own bullets.
game.title: The Bullet Hopper (Jam Version)

details.title: The Bullet Hopper (Jam Version)
details.description:
Made in 48h for the Kenney Jam 2023 THEME: ExplorationExplore the map and locate&collect all 13 treasures as swiftly as you can. To aid you in this quest, you will be equipped with three types of guns that propel you with their bullets:

Impact: His bullets launches forwards upon contact, making it useful for quick boosts and performing simple double jumps.
Homing: When the bullet from this gun makes contact with a solid surface, it will home in on the player, enabling you to execute double jumps (or triple) in more intricate environments and scenarios.
Bridge: With a higher firing rate and slower bullets, the Bridge gun serves as a valuable tool for traversing large gaps efficiently as well as for walljumps.


===============================================
Control:
WASD/ArrowKeys/Spacebar: Move & JumpMouse: Aim & ShootR: RestartL: Quit to main
==============================================Assets Used:https://kenney.nl/assets/pixel-line-platformerhttps://kenney.nl/assets/1-bit-packhttps://kenney.nl/assets/1-bit-platformer-packhttps://kenney.nl/assets/1-bit-input-prompts-pixel-16https://kenney.nl/assets/crosshair-pack
Sound effects obtained from https://www.zapsplat.comMusic obtained from https://opengameart.orghttps://opengameart.org/content/cave-themehttps://opengameart.org/content/hero-immortal

game.short_text: Look out ahead, who knows what's lurking...
game.title: Beware the Mine

details.title: Beware the Mine
details.description:
If you're having issues with performance in the web browser, please download the PC build! It's nicer looking anyway. ;)
Created in 2 days for Kenney Jam 2023
Theme: Exploration
Team:
Eurus- Programmer
Magpie - Art/VFX
W35 - Designer


Synopsis:
Play as miner trapped in a cave, who teams up with an enchanted pickaxe to escape together. 

Controls:
WASD - Move
Left mouse - Swing Pickaxe
Unlockable Abilities (find the glowing yellow orbs)
Right mouse - Heavy Swing Ability
Q - Wayfinder Ability
E - Scream Ability

Tips:
Goal: Find the switches to trigger the escape route and find the abilities to make your search easer.
Pickaxe: has some very good tips, you should probably pay attention to what he has to say. 
Map: the map consists of 3 switches, 3 abilities, enemy rocks that will hunt the player down, explosive rocks do damage to the player.

game.short_text: A simple rogue-lite made for Kenney's Jam 2023
game.title: Secrets of the Abyss

details.title: Secrets of the Abyss
details.description:
Entry for Kenney Jam 2023
Ranked
2nd in Presentation (visuals)
9th Overall
30 Randomly generated Levels - can you beat them?
Controls (Keyboard)
WASD: MoveLeft-click: Attack (in movement direction)Right-click: Dash
Know Bugs
The game is probably highly imbalance at this point.
Embark on a perilous journey into the dark depths of the Abyss, where untold secrets and unimaginable treasures lie hidden. "Secrets of the Abyss" is an enthralling rogue-lite dungeon crawler that challenges players to navigate through procedurally generated levels, battle menacing creatures, uncover ancient mysteries, and overcome treacherous traps.
Assets Used
Graphics: Mini Dungeon (by Kenney)Animations: MixamoMusic: SUSPENSEFUL - Suspense Background Music - YouTube
Some of these are affiliate links, I get a small kick-back.
Destruction: RayFireDamage Numbers: Damage Numbers ProInput Handling: RewiredPathfinding: A* Pathfinding ProSound: Cute UI & Interact Sound Effects Pack

game.short_text: Uncover the secrets of the Treacherous Sea
game.title: Treacherous Sea

details.title: Treacherous Sea
details.description:
Treacherous Sea is a short game made for Kenney Jam 2023! The theme was Exploration, so, do you want to uncover the mysteries of the Treacherous Sea?
(Recommended to play in fullscreen)


ABOUT
You play as a pirate, hungry for gold. There are legends about unimagineable riches hidden in the Treacherous Sea. No one was able to get it before, but they are just amateurs.
Control the ship and move along the sea. Explore all of its interesting places and stories.
But remember, your main goal is the treasure.

Game assets: Kenney. Only the font is my custom one. (Requirements of the jam)
CONTROLS
W, S - Move ship forward / backward.
A, D - Rotate the ship.
E, Q - Rotate the camera.
LMB - Interact, place marker.

TAB - Open map.

RMB - Destroy marker if in hand. Otherwise, LMB on the already placed marker.

game.short_text: Find hidden treasures and uncover mysteries!
game.title: X Marks the Spot

details.title: X Marks the Spot
details.description:
Controls: 
WASD to moveMove mouse to look aroundClick to interact/use toolsScroll to change tools
Dear Adventurer,
If you are reading this, then fate has brought you to a place of profound mystery. You see, I was looking for remains of the enigmatic Xiteks civilisation that made their home on this island thousands of years ago. I was expecting to find little more than empty ruins. The truth, however, proved far more incredible.
Alas, unforeseen circumstances forced me to an early departure, thwarting any further attempts to uncover the secrets that this place holds. To keep my findings save, I locked down the site and hid my preliminary findings. It is up to you to unravel the mysteries of the Xiteks and change the course of history.
Godspeed,
Professor James McKenney
P.S. X marks the spot

Goal
Discover and unlock all 7 planets(including your home planet) by gathering required resources around the map.
Controls
SPACE or E - to move through dialogs.
WASD or ARROW keys - to control your spaceship.
M - to open a map.

Check the map if you feel lost.

moreInfo.Author: Dmytro

game.short_text: Explore the endless space and collect resources to survive
game.title: Space exploration

details.title: Space exploration
details.description:
Setting:
Lost in time and space, you travel to planets and stars to gather resources for your ship. Unfortunately, each journey will cost you fuel and damage your ship. Choose your path wisely to travel through space as long as you can. Who knows what mysterious things you might find out there?
How to play:
Hover your mouse over planets in the grid to see what resources they give you in the info box at the top right. Clicking on a planet next to your ship will move your ship there and collect the resources. Each move will cost you 10 fuel and 5 hull. You can see your current stats in the top left info box. There are also some risky options. Planets marked with "???" will either give you a big boost or cost you more. Traveling further may trigger some visual events. Have fun!
Uniqueness:
To make each run unique, every map is generated anew. The background images also change with each run.
This game is part of the KenneyJam
The theme of the jam was Exploration and the time limit was 53h.
All assets except the background music, are from Kenneys website. Thank you so much! 
Background music: Space Atmosphere by Alexandr Zhelanov, https://soundcloud.com/alexandr-zhelanov

You want more?
If you liked this game and are interested in more space games. Check out the action rouglike game from my friend Studio Boreli. There is currently a demo on itch.io and steam.
You can also check out my Twitter for updates on my game Radiant darkness.Unpack the zip and start the Space exploration.exe
